assets.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: square item-card artwork inside a premium portrait mobile board game utility panel
Primary request: a polished Cairo travel-inventory card showing a small canvas explorer pouch opened to reveal a brass compass, blue water canteen, linen bandage roll, and one glowing amber hourglass shard; these objects communicate a three-slot travel inventory without text.
Scene/backdrop: warm aged parchment field inside a restrained dark walnut and antique brass card frame.
Subject: one compact still-life of the pouch and four readable travel tools, large simple silhouettes suitable for a phone screen.
Style/medium: refined hand-painted storybook game UI illustration matching a warm parchment Cairo travel journal; premium Google Play paid-game quality, low-stimulation and tactile.
Composition/framing: centered square card, generous safe padding, single focal cluster, clear at 160px display size.
Lighting/mood: soft warm daylight, subtle depth, no bloom or flashing effects.
Color palette: parchment cream, walnut brown, antique brass, muted Nile teal, small amber accent.
Materials/textures: lightly worn canvas, brushed brass, watercolor parchment, restrained embossing.
Constraints: no text, letters, numbers, logo, watermark, UI labels, dice, character, skull, coins, or button symbols; do not place tiny decorative clutter; all objects fully inside the card frame.
Avoid: photorealism, neon, glossy casino styling, excessive gold glow, ornate unreadable filigree, multiple card variants.

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: square character-skill card artwork inside a premium portrait mobile board game utility panel
Primary request: create a polished skill card for the exact explorer cat shown in the reference strip, communicating a calm ready-to-use travel ability through one confident raised paw, a subtle curved Nile-teal path breeze, and a small brass compass sparkle; no specific gameplay effect is depicted.
Input images: explorer-cat-idle-strip.png is the identity and costume reference; preserve the same orange tabby face, teal scarf, tan pith helmet with goggles, backpack, proportions, and friendly readable silhouette.
Scene/backdrop: warm aged parchment field inside a restrained dark walnut and antique brass card frame matching the companion item card.
Subject: one full-body explorer cat, centered, face large and readable at 160px, relaxed confident pose.
Style/medium: refined hand-painted storybook game UI illustration, premium Google Play paid-game quality, low-stimulation and tactile.
Composition/framing: centered square card, generous safe padding, single character only, no cropping of ears, tail, paws, or hat.
Lighting/mood: soft warm daylight, quiet readiness, no dramatic bloom.
Color palette: parchment cream, walnut brown, antique brass, muted Nile teal, orange tabby fur.
Materials/textures: watercolor parchment, cloth scarf, worn leather gear, restrained embossed frame.
Constraints: preserve character identity and costume; no text, letters, numbers, logo, watermark, dice, item pouch, skull, coins, second character, or button symbols.
Avoid: photorealism, neon magic, combat pose, excessive particles, casino styling, ornate unreadable filigree, multiple card variants.
